entityTypes.name: executive_summaries
entityTypes.description: Cross-domain C-suite executive summaries with KPI tracking and recommended actions

key_metrics.description: Array of KPI objects with name, current, baseline, change, status

risks.description: Risks and issues requiring executive attention

domains_covered.description: Which domains contributed data to this summary

entityTypes.name: kpi_reports
entityTypes.description: Detailed KPI tracking with trend analysis and deviation alerts

kpi_name.description: Name of the KPI being tracked

baseline_value.description: Baseline or target value for comparison

change_percent.description: Percentage change from baseline or prior period

notes.description: Context or explanation for significant deviations
